description_long: This object consists of three cigarettes, each featuring a cylindrical shape with a white paper body and a tan-brown filter at one end. The cigarettes are depicted in a loose arrangement, with one appearing partially broken, exposing some of the inner tobacco. The filters are clearly demarcated from the rest of the cigarette by a color change. The tips of the cigarettes show some charring and ash, indicating they have been lit or partially smoked. The paper wrapping is smooth and matte, with no visible branding or text. No packaging is present, and the cigarettes are shown as individual items.
description: Three loose cigarettes with tan filters and white paper bodies, one partially broken and some tips showing ash and charring.
description_view_0: Three cigarettes are seen from an angled top-down view, highlighting the cylindrical shape and the tan filters.
description_view_1: Side view showing the full length of the cigarettes, with one broken and the others intact, filters clearly visible.
description_view_2: Top-down view focusing on the arrangement and the exposed tobacco in the broken cigarette.
description_view_3: Side view with all three cigarettes aligned, showing the length and the broken section in one cigarette.
attribute_burn_mark: Visible charring and discoloration at the tips of some cigarettes.
